items.text:
Do you feel anxious
about this one?

I'm not so sure.
At what should I be looking?

Two mirrors. As you know,
that's often a threat --
A threat to split me. Yes.

I don't mind it, not so much,
not any more.

items.comment: Todo: I like that we are talking about things that are relevant, but don't really like that we are talking about how to do the puzzle. We should enforce purity about this.
items.text:
But I also feel
it's not quite right today.
